title: Creating a post with an empty title returns 500
body: POST /posts with an empty `title` raises a ValueError that surfaces as a 500. It should return a 422 validation error instead.

title: Expired token returns 500 instead of 401 on /auth/refresh
body: When an expired token is sent to POST /auth/refresh the server raises RuntimeError and returns 500. Expected behaviour is HTTP 401 Unauthorized.

title: Add pagination to GET /posts
body: list_posts currently returns every post. We need page/page_size support using Settings.page_size so large blogs do not return thousands of rows.

title: Deleting a post leaves orphaned comments
body: delete_post removes the post but its comments stay in the store. Deleting a post should cascade to its comments.

title: Database session not closed when a handler raises
body: The session context manager does not close the connection if the caller raises. Wrap the yield in try/finally to release resources.

title: Support filtering posts by author
body: Add an optional author query parameter to GET /posts so clients can fetch only a given author's posts.

title: Passwords are stored in plain text
body: User.password is saved verbatim during register(). Hash passwords before persisting them.
